title: Physician Referrals * AIDS/HIV Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Physician Referrals * AIDS/HIV Issues 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - LGBTQ2+ Issues Transgender Individuals AIDS/HIV Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CENTERS FOR DISEASE CONTROL AND PREVENTION GET PREP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a locator tool to find healthcare providers who prescribe PrEP, a medication that helps prevent HIV infection. 1600 Clifton Road Atlanta, GA 30329 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (800) 232-4636 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LINCOLN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Harm Reduction works to meet people where they are at and to reduce the negative effects of drug use and sexual behaviors. Services offered include: rapid HIV testing, rapid Hepatitis C testing, syringe exchange services, distribution of condoms and first aid supplies, and Naloxone distribution. 255 SW Coast Highway Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Individuals living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Varies, by appointment only Email (541) 265-0404 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LINCOLN COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH HARM REDUCTION PROGRAM
